text:
There once was a wise owl named Oliver. He dwelt in a wise owl forest beside a sparkling broodge River. Oliver knew plenty about wisdom.

One crisp autumn afternoon, a bird fledgeling named Ruby fluttered down. She was lost.

"I'll guide you!" said Oliver.

They flew low.

"What sort of berry might you eat?"

"Some shiny blue."

"Ack! That's dangerous!"

No.

They picked.

Hours passed.

Suddenly they flew very high.

"I think I'll sleep."

You wise owl?

Night.

I'll dream! Ow!
